prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. A guest room (soon to be Souta's room) in a California suburban home, afternoon. A 7-year-old Japanese girl (Hana — bright expression, cheerful, wearing a colorful casual outfit) sits on the floor, drawing on a large piece of paper. Colored pencils, crayons, and markers are scattered around her. The paper shows a child's warm, imperfect handwriting: 'Welcome Souta!' with colorful drawings of a house, flowers, and stick figures. The room is mid-cleanup — a few cardboard boxes remain in the corner, a bed frame is partially set up. Afternoon diffused window light falls directly onto Hana's drawing paper, making the crayon colors glow softly. Color grading: warm natural afternoon tones. Film-like gentle desaturation. The crayons' colors provide small bright accents within the muted palette. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. The room's space is shown broadly — Hana is small in the lower portion of the frame. The half-tidied room with remaining boxes provides context as generous negative space above. Camera: 50mm lens, f/2.5, ISO 200. Fine film grain. Focus sharp on the drawing paper and Hana's small hands. Background softly blurred with old-lens bokeh. The texture of the paper, crayons, and carpet is tactile. The mood is unsolicited kindness — a child's self-initiated hospitality. No one asked her to make this. Pure warmth.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, professional art, perfect handwriting, commercial child photography, stock photo, dark room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
